_comment: Three performance research strands for shopware-autoresearch.

tracks.label: Forschungsstrang 1 — Request-Performance
tracks.description: Einzelne HTTP-Requests schneller: TTFB, PHP-Pipeline, Queries pro Request, Caching, Rendering
tracks.success_criteria: p95 total response time on fixed request set at reference catalog size

tracks.label: Forschungsstrang 2 — API-Performance
tracks.description: Store API, Admin API, Sync API und weitere APIs: Latenz, Payload, Pagination, Bulk
tracks.success_criteria: p95 latency per API family on fixed API bench endpoints

tracks.label: Forschungsstrang 3 — Katalog-Skalierung
tracks.description: Performance bei hunderttausenden Produkten — Storefront und Administration
tracks.success_criteria: p95 on representative storefront + admin flows at >= 100k products

tracks.label: Infrastructure & process
tracks.description: Docker stack, benches, submodules, Pawl hygiene

fallback.label: Other
fallback.description: Families without a track assignment — add them to tracks.json
